title: Moose Configs
description: NextGen Moose configs forever undefeated. The world's greatest PvP modpack to ever exist.
body:
### Minecraft Powered By Moose Configs!

Legendary configs, settings, and performance kept from you for years; finally published for you to use as well!
Aside from the high performance modpack, I've also included the following:
- Shaderpacks and corresponding configs
- Texturepacks (Base Pack & Block Overlay)
- Stupidly good fortune/luck (you'll be shocked how lucky you get from using this modpack)
- Improves pvp skill significantly! (ask anyone frfr)


# Default Keybinds
Feel free to change them if you'd like ^-^

- Default shaders keybind is `K`
- Default togglesprint keybind is `P`
- Default waypoint keybind is `F10`
- Default worldmap keybind is `M`
- Default freecam keybind is `U`
- Default freecam-player keybind is `I`
- Default nametags keybind is `N`
- Default zoom keybind is `~`
- Default simple hud utilities keybind is `INSERT`
- Default armor hud keybind is `DELETE`
- Default player/npc hider is `END`
- Default minimap keybind is `PAGEUP`
- Default on-screen waypoints keybind is `PAGEDOWN`
- Default voicechat GUI is `RightShift`
- Default minimap on hold enlarger keybind is `\`
- Default zoom in/out for minimap keybinds are `-` and `=`
- Default freelook keybind is `LeftAlt`
- Default chat keybind is `Enter` (i had my reasons)


# FAQ
<details>
<summary>Why?</summary>
I've gotten sick of sending my modpack's entire root directory as a giant zip file to my friends so they can play with my modpack. I've finally decided to post my modpack as an official one on Modrinth after many requests. Enjoy!


</details>


<details>
<summary>Will you update this?</summary>
If there's any conflicts or errors, I'll be sure to update the modpack!

</details>



<details>
<summary>Other versions?</summary>
I'll only consider making a modpack for a different version if I get a lot of requests. Undecided for now.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Where can I find you?</summary>
Instagram, Youtube, and Discord are the main ways of finding me online. You definitely won't find me irl though ;)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Can you add X mod?</summary>
There's a good chance I might add a mod if it improves performance, if I like the mod, or if its simply a good addition to add to the modpack. Feel free to reach out to me if you'd like me to add the mod of your choice!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Why is my screen blurry?</summary>
You're most likely referring to the Motionblur Mod, you can change that via typing in chat /motionblur [0-100]. To disable Motionblur completely, run the following command: /motionblur 0.
I personally use anywhere from 19-47 depending on how many players are around me, but feel free to use what works best for you! And yes, motionblur does seem to work with the shaders.

</details>

[Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@Mooseableg)
